title: Marketing Executive
description:
Marketing Executive

The Marketing Executive supports the planning and execution of marketing initiatives to build brand awareness, generate leads, and support sales growth. This role works closely with internal teams and external partners to deliver campaigns across digital and offline channels.

Key Responsibilities :

Campaign Execution

  • Plan and execute marketing campaigns across digital, social media, email, and offline channels
  • Coordinate and support marketing activities (seminars, exhibitions, roadshows, etc.,) on logistics, booth setup, and promotional materials
  • Manage and execute email marketing calendar and ensure alignment with business priorities

Digital and Social Media Marketing

  • Implement digital marketing activities (content planning, posting, engagement) across a broad range of digital marketing channels (Social Media [Linkedin, Facebook, Instagram, etc.], mass mailing, SEO, Google Ads, etc).
  • Manage, maintain and update the company’s website

Content & Communications

  • Prepare marketing content such as brochures, EDMs, social posts, and presentations with use of AI tools to draft, optimize, and personalize marketing content
  • Ensure brand consistency across all communications

Marketing & Performance Analysis

  • Use AI and analytics tools to track campaign performance
  • Prepare regular marketing reports

Sales Support

  • Work closely with sales teams to support lead generation activities
  • Manage marketing assets and materials inventory

 Requirements:

  • Diploma or Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communications, Business, or related field
  • 1–3 years of marketing experience (fresh graduates with relevant internships may be considered)
  • Familiarity with digital marketing and social media platforms
  • Basic understanding of marketing analytics and reporting tools
  • Strong communication and organizational skills

All successful candidates can expect a competitive remuneration package, good career development and a comprehensive range of benefits. 

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

postedCompany.description:
GAIA SCIENCE PTE. LTD.

Company Overview

We have a professional team with a collective experience of more than 186 man-years in the Scientific Industry, supplying scientific and laboratory equipment to the universities, research institutions and industries. We are recognized as a team who brings cutting-edge technologies from our partners and principals to our valued customers
 
Our products are being used in application areas such as genomics, proteomics, cell biology, animal research, organic synthesis, nanotechnology, clean energy research, environmental analysis, imaging, and in educational areas. Besides providing Turnkey Laboratory Solutions to our customers, we are also involved in the design and manufacturing of bioengineering products such as mobile laboratories, modular BSL-3 laboratories, tissue trimming tables, necropsy tables and etc with international partners.
 
Bridging state-of-the-art laboratory products to the scientific community is our aim and providing service excellence is our goal. We see the scientific community as our partner in promoting scientific and technological advancement for a better world and better quality of life for all.
 
Our Mission
 
To support the scientific community by providing cutting-edge technologies, turnkey solutions and service excellence for the advancement of science and a better world.

 
Our Vision
 
Towards a Greener Earth and Better Quality of Life through the promotion of Science and Technology.
 
We are a dynamic scientific equipment & solution provider to the scientific community, providing cutting-edge technologies, turnkey solutions and technical services for the advance of Science. In view of our expansion, we are inviting qualified candidate(s) to join us and discover a new world of learning opportunities, challenging job experience and a fulfilling and rewarding career.
postedCompany.name: GAIA SCIENCE PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D05 Clementi New Town, Hong Leong Garden, Pasir Panjang
